pages.title: The Great Work
pages.text: The Aspect Cauldron stands as the heart of an alchemist's workshop. To awaken its latent power, one must maintain a constant heat source beneath its iron belly. Once the liquid begins to churn and bubble, the transmutation may commence.$(br2)I. Carefully introduce up to $(6)3 unique ingredients$(0) into the roiling depths.$(br)II. The hidden essences will only manifest if $(6)at least 2 ingredients$(0) share a common resonance.$(br)III. One may step into the steaming vapors to embrace their ephemeral gifts, or use glass bottles to preserve the concoction for later use.
